## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**EMP_EDIT_WO_NOTES** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPL -> EMPLOYEE); JOB_HEADER (WO_NUM->JOB, WO_SUFF->SUFFIX); JOB_OPERATIONS (WO_SEQ -> SEQ)

**EMP_IN_PROCESS_G** -> BALANCING_GROUP (WAE_GROUP -> BAL_GROUP); DEPARTMENTS (DEPT -> DEPT_ID); EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE); LUNCH_SHIFT (SHIFT -> SHIFT); MENU_PROCESS (STATION -> SESSION_ID); WORKCENTERS (WORKCENTER -> MACHINE)

**EMP_SCHED_ATTRIB** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPL -> EMPLOYEE); WORKCENTERS (WC -> MACHINE)

**EMP_WC_TITLES** -> WORKCENTERS (WC -> MACHINE)
